creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-04-30 10:00:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/ack         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  ack is a tool like grep, aimed at programmers with large trees of
  heterogeneous source code. It is purely in Perl, and takes advantage
  of the power of Perl's regular expressions.
  
  WWW: http://petdance.com/ack/
  
  PR:             ports/122919
  Submitted by:   Frank Steinborn <steinex at nognu.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1000    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +40 -0     ports/sysutils/ack/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/sysutils/ack/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/ack/pkg-descr (new)
